Author: Serpens66
Name: Some Settings
Description: Adds small gameplay/QoL settings for Stronghold Crusader Definitive Edition.

Changes: Minimap dragging now follows the mouse cursor directly.
Add Slider for Market Buy/Sell Prices
Added checkbox to remember the last used AIV/AIC setting for the AI
Allow auto-sell in market if amount is bigger than 0 (so no longer at least 1 in storage)
Integrated AI Economy Protection with separate settings for AI building pauses, AI panic demolition, and AI hovel deletion.
Fixed custom building refund percentages above the vanilla 50 percent value.
Added a synchronized knight dismount command button that turns selected own mounted knights into swordsmen with matching health ratio.
Added an optional synchronized quarry button for relocating its linked stone pile after placing a replacement nearby.
Added detailed Info-level diagnostics for every quarry-pile relocation stage.
Fixed quarry relocation packet serialization by using an explicit MessagePack formatter.
Replaced the unusable quarry-pile placement mode with a validated clockwise rotation to the next available position.
Fixed quarry-pile rotation using the rectangular tile span instead of the original pile grid size, which caused the replacement to fail verification and be removed.
Fixed freshly spawned quarry piles being rejected while they were in the game's normal NeedsInit state.
Kept the quarry-pile rotation button visible while an owned quarry remains selected and left NeedsInit visual setup to the game.
Added post-initialization quarry-pile tile visuals, cleared old stone visuals before rotation, and restored linked quarry-pile demolition.
Replaced raw quarry-pile spawns with full prefab placement and expanded the isometric rotation ring for normal tile interaction and visual registration.
Removed obsolete quarry-pile visual retries, avoided duplicate local placement validation, and kept runtime initialization registered through the short-lived plugin lifecycle.
Matched and translated the quarry-pile button tooltip to the simple vanilla HUD rollover style and position, removed its hover delay, and moved its diagnostic logging to Debug.
